successCriteria.description: auth.dto.ts exists with LoginRequest, LoginResponse, and loginSchema
auth.service.ts exists with IAuthService and AuthService.login that validates credentials and returns JWT
auth.controller.ts exists with login and logout routes
auth.middleware.ts exists with authenticateJWT and requireRole
No sensitive data logged in login
All async errors are caught and handled

constraints: Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (loginSchema)
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII (GP-004)
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control (logout requires authenticateJWT, requireRole available)
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled (GP-006)
Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (UserRepository, EmployeeRepository)
outOfScope: Phase 4: Employee View – Leave Application Form
Any modifications to existing leave, policy, balance, notification modules
